vol_name: Buddhist-Informed Mindfulness Practice in Recovery from Bipolar Disorder: Qualitative Study Data and Analyses
vol_description:
This qualitative study interviewed 9 individuals with lived experience of recovering from bipolar disorder using Buddhist-informed mindfulness practice. This dataset includes:
- 9 interview transcripts (RTF)
- 9 notes from verification interviews (RTF)
- 8 audio interviews (.mp3)
- coding and analysis diagrams (PDF)
- code system and phrases (RTF)
- blank recruitment and informed consent documents (PDF)
- IRB proposal (lays out study design and rationale; PDF)
- supporting documentation (.txt or RTF)

Uploading the QDA project file (f4analyse .f4 XML) is pending expanded filetype support from Databrary.
